'''Jugsmuk''' was a settlement on [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]. It was ruled by the [[Jugsmuk clan]], and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] its [[Matron/Legends|Matron]] had at that point invested heavily in constructing a landing field for the new [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] outside of their fortress that'd come to be known as [[Jugsmuk Station]].<ref name="MS" />

{{City-stub}}
